About Our District

Building Bright Futures Since 1952

For over 70 years, Willowbrook School District has been a cornerstone of educational excellence. We believe every child deserves a nurturing environment where they can discover their passions and develop their unique talents.

Our dedicated educators, innovative programs, and strong community partnerships create an ecosystem where students don't just learn—they thrive, grow, and prepare for success in an ever-changing world.

STEM Focus

Robotics, coding & labs

Arts & Music

Full arts curriculum

Global Learning

Language immersion

Athletics

15 varsity sports

70+
Years of
Excellence
Our Campuses

Schools for Every Stage

From early childhood through high school, we provide exceptional educational experiences at every level.

6 Schools

  • Play-based learning
  • Reading & math foundations
  • Art, music & PE

3 Schools

High School

Grades 9-12 • Ages 14-18

  • AP & IB programs
  • Career pathways

Signature Programs

Learning Beyond the Classroom

We offer unique programs that cater to diverse interests and learning styles, ensuring every student finds their path to success.

STEM Innovation Lab

Robotics, 3D printing, coding, and AI exploration for grades 3-12.

Dual Language Immersion

Spanish and Mandarin programs starting from kindergarten.

Outdoor Education

Environmental science, gardening, and nature exploration programs.

Performing Arts Academy

Theater, orchestra, band, and visual arts with professional mentorship.

45+
After-school clubs

What Families Say
